name: i18n-json-goto-definition
description: Jump between i18n keys in code and their JSON locale definitions — in both directions.

i18nJsonGotoDefinition.enabledLanguageId.description: Language IDs where Go to Definition is enabled. Empty array enables all languages.

i18nJsonGotoDefinition.locales.description: Locales to search. The first matching locale is used for navigation.

i18nJsonGotoDefinition.pathTemplates.description: JSON path templates relative to the workspace. Supported placeholders: {locale}, {language}, {namespace}, {namespaceFile}.

i18nJsonGotoDefinition.defaultNamespace.description: Namespace used for keys without an explicit namespace.

i18nJsonGotoDefinition.namespaceFileMap.description: Mapping from namespace to file name without .json. If a namespace is not mapped, the namespace itself is used.

i18nJsonGotoDefinition.namespaceSeparato.description: Separator between namespace and key, as in i18next.

i18nJsonGotoDefinition.keySeparator.description: Separator between nested key parts in JSON.

i18nJsonGotoDefinition.searchAllNamespac.description: Search all JSON files in configured locale directories when a key without namespace is not found in defaultNamespace.

i18nJsonGotoDefinition.resolveTemplateSt.description: Resolve simple template string expressions that reference local string constants, for example `${BASE_KEY}.title`.

i18nJsonGotoDefinition.ignoreTemplateStr.description: Ignore template strings with expressions like `${...}` when they cannot be resolved.
